title: Calcifer
description: A mod that adds new block variants to calcite!
body:
![A wall made out of calcite pillars with the word "Calcifer" inscribed onto it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65b6037fd4e8bddc2edbac49c9d1cc68d0385ea4.png)
## Overview
- Adds slabs and stairs for calcite
- Adds calcite brick set
- Adds polished calcite set

Credits:
- Code - Its_Total
- Art - KognitionMC
